title: Faithful Fusion Glowing Ores 64x Addon
description: Addon for Faithful 64x texture pack. Make Ores Glow for non-Optifine users.
body:
Addon for Faithful 64x texture pack. Make Ores Glow, so it's easier to see when mining in the dark.\
Put it on top of the [Faithful 64x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-64x) texture pack so it works properly.\
![Ores Glow in the cave.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/863e3746865b05b7ab9e16d3b1b40c72ef26e2c6.png)
**REQUIRES:**\
This texture pack addon also requires [Fusion (Connected Textures)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures) by [SuperMartin642](https://modrinth.com/user/SuperMartijn642) to work.\
If you're an Optifine user, I suggest you download another version that I have created for Optifine users, namely [Faithful Glowing Ores 64x Addon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-glowing-ores-64x-addon).
